entry.message: Community agent run in suggestion mode

window.operatingHours: Agent checks 10:00-19:00 America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires; War Room opens weekdays after 11:15 AM ARG; closed Saturdays and Sundays

items.message:
Hey team! 👋

Today's [**Stargazer Axiom daily thread**](https://community.outlier.ai/t/daily-thread-07-10/2903473) is up.

Please take a few minutes to read it before tasking today. The topic is **Test Quality**, with a reminder about **P2P tests verify existing functionality wasn't broken by your changes.**.

Quick rule: P2P tests must pass before AND after the gold patch. Test real regressions, not trivialities.



Use the daily thread for blockers, Cursor issues, validation/eval problems, onboarding questions, or task-related doubts 🙌
items.ignoredReason: Manager announcement authored by the configured bot user, not a contributor support request.

items.message: Can we get the war room link for today?

decisions.message: Can we get the war room link for today?
decisions.reason: Deterministic War Room pre-open availability rule
decisions.reply: Not yet. The War Room will be open after 11:15 AM ARG today. Please come back then for live support.
